body.title: [hold] Wire mru_order into Granny's dispatch selection (consume the MRU, not just record it)
body.intention: I intend that when 2+ wakeable workers can serve the same role, Granny tries them in MRU (most-recently-dispatched-first) order — so the recency data it already records actually steers dispatch.
body.description:
**Blocked on: T-converge-worker-dispatch-onto-rules-engine** (multi-worker/per-instance routing lands there) — and low-value until 2+ workers serve one role (today DS is the only builder, so MRU order is a no-op).

**Gap this closes (named at T-granny-mru-and-stall-alarm close 2026-07-02):** that ticket built + PROVED the MRU primitives — `record_dispatch()` (recency tracking, called on every successful dispatch) and `mru_order(candidates)` (recency-first sort, proven 9ff0a3cc) — but deliberately did NOT wire `mru_order` into `run_once`'s dispatch selection, because the rules engine returns a single target per ticket and consuming the MRU means changing the candidate-selection path (touching live dispatch/rules logic), which was scoped out to protect the live Granny and because it is coupled to multi-worker routing that doesn't exist yet.

**What to build:** where `run_once` resolves a ticket's target, when the role admits MULTIPLE wakeable workers, order them via `mru_order()` and try in that order (first available wins). Single-candidate roles are unaffected (mru_order of one = identity).

**Completion criteria:** with two wakeable workers W1, W2 both serving role R and W2 more-recently-dispatched, a new role-R ticket is offered to W2 before W1. With one candidate, behavior is unchanged.

**Test plan (real red->green):** unit — two wakeable candidates for a role, record_dispatch(W2) last; assert dispatch tries W2 first. Red before mru_order is consumed in selection; green after.

**Scope boundary:** consume the existing mru_order primitive in dispatch selection only; do NOT rebuild the rules engine (that is the convergence ticket).

**Affected files:** unseen_university/devices/granny/daemon.py (dispatch target selection), unseen_university/devices/granny/stall_state.py (mru_order already exists).
